---
title: "Skagit County, Washington"
year: 2018
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport", "Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2018 CDL Disposal Rate Review

[report](https://www.skagitcounty.net/PublicWorksSolidWaste/Documents/CDL%20Disposal%20Rate%20memo%20Ver2.pdf)

# 2007 Transfer Station Feasibility / Financial Evaluation

Skagit County operates a full-service transfer station / HHW facility and two
remote satellite facilities serving over 120,000 residents. Bell & Associates
developed a five-year rate structure to cover the cost of service for transfer
operations, capital replacement, long-term liability, and the County’s
diversion programs.

Reference: Margo Gillaspy, Skagit County

:::
